nacho-lasagna-pasta-chips.name: Nacho Lasagna Pasta Chips

ingredients.prep: cooked according to package instructions and drained, still warm

instructions: In a small bowl, stir together the cheddar cheese powder, chili powder, onion powder, and salt until evenly combined.
In a medium bowl, toss the warm lasagna noodles with the avocado oil and hot sauce until well coated. If any noodles stick together, separate them and make sure all sides are coated in oil.
Preheat the air fryer to 390˚F (200°C) for 5 minutes.
Layer three of the lasagna noodles to the air fryer basket. Cook for 6 minutes, tossing every 2–3 minutes and watching carefully to avoid burning, until the pasta is beginning to brown and crisp.

Add the cooked pasta chips to the same medium bowl and tear into smaller pieces. Toss with half of the spice mixture. Repeat with the remaining lasagna noodles. Let the lasagna chips cool slightly before serving, about 5 minutes. The chips will continue to crisp as they cool.
Serve the pasta chips with salsa for dipping.

nuts-and-dried-fruit-tart-lezzet.name: Nuts And Dried Fruit Tart
instructions: 1. Let's start our journey in the top queues between special days and recipes.
2. Bake the dough for 30 minutes in the oven heated in advance.
3. Take dry pulses on it with oil paper.
4. Cut dry fruits into small pieces.
5. Get fruits, walnuts and nuts in the pan.
6. Add sugar and butter and roast for 10 minutes in jealous fire.
8. Broadcast the prepared material on the pizzle tart dough.
9. Cook the sesame and cook for 5 minutes in the hot oven.
